svg.font-family: Segoe UI, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: Data Vault 2.0 — E-Commerce Raw Vault ERD
INSERT-ONLY · Hash Keys · No business rules · Full audit trail

g.text: PK = primary key FK = foreign key HK = hash key (BINARY 16)
Keys only — no amounts or dates here

svg.text: INSERT-ONLY · No physical updates or deletes · LOAD_DTS = when vault received it · REC_SRC = which system · HASH_DIFF = change detection · No FK constraints on reference tables
